name: DBTCloud
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the server and basic metadata extraction of pipelines.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that the token can reach the dbt Cloud API and read the configured account.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to reach the dbt Cloud account, please validate the Host, Account Id and Token

steps.name: GetJobs
steps.description: Validate that the API can properly reach the server.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch Jobs info please validate the credentials or validate if user has access to fetch Jobs

steps.name: GetRuns
steps.description: Validate that the Discovery API can properly reach the server.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch Runs info please validate the credentials or validate if user has access to fetch metadata from Discovery API
